scenes.visual_note: Mira owl appears in professional clinical context, clean lines
scenes.subtitle_text: GluMira: insulin-on-board analytics for your practice.
scenes.voice_text: GluMira provides real-time insulin-on-board modelling, stacking risk detection, and patient-ready reporting for diabetes care teams.

scenes.visual_note: Stacking overlap zones highlighted with clinical precision
scenes.subtitle_text: Automatic dose stacking and overlap detection.
scenes.voice_text: The stacking engine flags dose overlaps before they become a clinical event — giving you and your patient advance warning.

scenes.visual_note: 24-hour density map with clinical annotation markers
scenes.subtitle_text: Full 24-hour insulin landscape at a glance.
scenes.voice_text: The density view maps total insulin pressure across twenty-four hours — ideal for identifying basal-bolus imbalances during reviews.

scenes.visual_note: Two-page clinical report with structured data sections
scenes.subtitle_text: One-tap PDF reports, structured for clinical review.
scenes.voice_text: Patients can generate a structured PDF report before each appointment. Time-in-range, dose history, and pattern summaries — all pre-formatted.

scenes.visual_note: Professional completion with subtle teal accent
scenes.subtitle_text: Choose how you'd like to proceed.
scenes.voice_text: That's the clinical overview. You can explore the dashboard or review the full documentation.
